added_fields.name: vt_departure_allowed
added_fields.default_behavior: If omitted, every hybrid station defaults to departure-allowed in data_loader normalization.

added_fields.name: vt_arrival_allowed
added_fields.default_behavior: If omitted, every hybrid station defaults to arrival-allowed in data_loader normalization.

schema_changes.notes: The schema records the permission fields as optional metadata; data_loader.py supplies defaults so legacy YAML files still load unchanged.

simple_case.notes: simple case converged strictly; sC remains arrival-only with all existing inbound itineraries still valid.

airside_presence.notes: After the s4/s6 airside micro-tuning, aircraft inventory binds lightly and reroutes some demand without creating unserved passengers.

complex_case.notes: complex case runs to completion with final diagnostics and audit output; strict convergence still remains false at max_total_iter and is reported as-is.

remaining_issues: complex case reaches max_total_iter before strict convergence; the report preserves converged_strictly=false rather than bypassing the strict gate.
simple case still emits non-severe audit warnings even though it converges strictly and has no severe audit issues.
complex case still emits non-severe audit warnings during the final reviewed run.
